# Offshore And Onshore

**Summary**: The geographic area encompassing both offshore and onshore wells in the study.

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-haidary|Al-Haidary, 2014]] analyzed well data from Field X to calibrate the MEM.
